description: Carlos Domingo and Robinson Burkey discuss Securitize's collaboration with Wormhole at the Solana conference, focusing on tokenization and cross-chain interoperability.
topic_summary: Securitize announces its integration with Wormhole for cross-chain asset deployment and scalability at the Solana conference [t=99:46]. The collaboration aims to enhance tokenized asset management and compliance across multiple blockchains [t=201:01].
